root.rep_text: รายงานสมาชิกปัจจุบัน
root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) OR ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code in ( null ) ) ) /* AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between :as_bg and :as_eg */ /*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
